mapper.select: SELECT d.*, b.car_id FROM detailed_list d JOIN bill b ON d.bill_id = b.bill_id WHERE d.bill_id = #{billId} ORDER BY d.start_time
SELECT d.*, b.car_id FROM detailed_list d JOIN bill b ON d.bill_id = b.bill_id JOIN vehicle v ON b.car_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.start_time DESC
SELECT d.*, b.car_id FROM detailed_list d JOIN bill b ON d.bill_id = b.bill_id WHERE b.car_id = #{carId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO detailed_list ( detail_id, bill_id, pile_id, charge_amount, charge_duration, start_time, end_time, charge_fee, service_fee, subtotal_fee, created_at ) VALUES ( #{detailId}, #{billId}, #{pileId}, #{chargeAmount}, #{chargeDuration}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{chargeFee}, #{serviceFee}, #{subtotalFee}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
